_comment: Mutation-testing AUDIT of the pure rules core — the honest check that the unit/fuzz suites actually kill logic mutants, not just execute lines. Run it with `npm run test:mutation` (takes tens of minutes); it is deliberately NOT wired into CI — it's a periodic local audit, per docs/TESTING.md. Scope is the three rules-engine files on purpose: they are the shared authority both backends run, where a surviving mutant means a wrong game result.
